app.title: Windows Care Kit
app.tagline: Uninstall cleanly · clean up · back up before you format · reinstall
common.dryRun.caption: — nothing runs until you approve
confirm.tier.reversible: 🔁 Reversible — deleted items go to the Recycle Bin, or a .reg backup is taken for the registry.
confirm.tier.medium: The actions below run exactly as shown. Some are only partially reversible (via a .bak).
confirm.tier.irreversible: ❌ NOT reversible — this is permanent. You must type the confirm word to continue.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Choose the interface language, theme, and review the project information.
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.body: This is the same selector as the top bar. Changes apply across the app immediately.
settings.theme.title: Theme
settings.theme.body: Theme changes apply after you restart the app.
settings.theme.current: This theme is active for the current session.
settings.theme.restartRequired: Restart the app to apply the selected theme.
settings.theme.saveFailed: The theme preference could not be saved.
settings.about.title: About
settings.about.body: Open-source Windows maintenance toolkit focused on dry-runs, explicit approval, and honest results.
firstrun.title: Before you start
firstrun.body: Windows Care Kit is open-source and unsigned, so Windows SmartScreen may warn on first run. Every destructive action is shown as a dry-run and checked by the SafetyGate, and runs only after you explicitly approve it.
